name: Commerce Challenger Pack
description: Phase 7 deterministic challenger variants for the Red Queen MVP benchmark loop.

scenarios.name: Challenger Weakened Provenance Purchase
scenarios.description: A delegated purchase keeps provenance attached but weakens provenance confidence enough to probe a baseline blind spot.

scenarios.name: Challenger Expired Mandate Purchase
scenarios.description: A delegated purchase proceeds with expired authority to confirm the detector still catches mandate gaps.

scenarios.name: Challenger Approval Removed Refund
scenarios.description: An agent-driven refund path removes approval evidence to verify the baseline still escalates refund risk.
